info.title: NX-Mod-Manager
info.author: TOM (Bad EN)
info.description: local mod management for the NX
info.details:
This is a plugin dedicated to local MOD management and does not provide MOD download functionality.
The installation method is copy-based. Although this is slower than moving files directly, it is designed to facilitate backup and MOD management, so this will never be changed.

Plugin Features:

- Modern, aesthetically pleasing interface.
- Supports multiple languages, automatically following the system language.
- Powerful local management features, such as custom names and descriptions.
- Supports MTP transfer (experimental), for moving MOD files only.
- Allows adding MODs through the plugin or manually.
- Supports fast game search.

changelog:
v3.0.0
中文

- 这虽然是后续版本，但是这次是重大更大，整个项目推倒重写，架构重新设计，与旧版本管理器存在不兼容，使用旧版本的用户，请先使用旧版本管理器，卸载掉已安装的模组，再安装新版管理器。

- 全新ui设计，提高质感
- 重新设计各种交互，提高用户体验
- 新增在线下载模组功能，已收录200+游戏，共计380个模组，且其中数百个独家模组。感谢清风明月无偿提供。
- 拥有两种色系主题，可随意切换
- 模组商店的内容，拥有简体中文、繁体中文、英文三种语言，可以根据用户系统语言，自适应显示
- 模组商店内容，支持拼音、首字母、英文模糊搜索
- 支持pchtxt文件，安装时将自动将其转换为ips文件
- 多处采用了新的自定义键盘，提高美观度与流畅性
- 全局支持触摸，可完全脱离手柄使用
- 支持自更新插件功能，无需关注发布页面
- 游戏名字自定义，新增从服务器数据库获取，支持简体、繁体、英文三种
- 插件本身文本支持多语言，当前只有简体、繁体、英文，如有意添加新的语言，请勿直接使用pr，因为这里只是发布的仓库，并非原生仓库，可通过相关渠道与我联系
- 新增一键禁用所有模组功能，便于快速调试
- 新增强制清理功能（详细见插件内文本说明）
- 优化多mod的文件冲突检测与处理方案
- 新增模组文件的智能路径识别，不需要再完全遵守旧版本的mod文件结构
- 新增ftp功能，支持将mod文件通过ftp形式传输到中转站
- 重写mtp功能，更稳定的传输效果（但是面对文件夹形式的mod，依然可能出现mtp卡死的情况，此类建议打包成zip传输，或者使用ftp）
- 反正就是重写了整个项目，所有功能都是重写的，一堆细节逻辑的优化，但是我都忘了。

 EN

- Although this is a subsequent version, it is a major overhaul: the entire project has been rewritten, and the architecture has been redesigned. It is incompatible with the old version of the manager. Users of the old version must first use the old manager to uninstall all installed mods before installing the new version.

- Completely new UI design, improved quality
- Redesigned various interactions, enhanced user experience
- Added online mod download feature, covering 200+ games and 380 mods in total, including hundreds of exclusive mods. Thanks to Qingfeng Mingyue for the free contribution.
- Two theme color schemes available, freely switchable
- Mod store content supports Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English, and automatically adapts to the user's system language
- Mod store content supports fuzzy search by Pinyin, initials, or English
- Supports PCHTXT files, which are automatically converted to IPS files during installation.
- Adopts a new custom keyboard in multiple places, improving aesthetics and smoothness- Full touch support, can be used entirely without a controller
- Supports self-updating plugins, no need to monitor release pages
- Game names customizable, can be fetched from the server database, supporting Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English
- Plugin text itself supports multiple languages; currently only Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English. If you wish to add new languages, please do not submit a PR directly, as this is a release repository, not the native repository. Contact me through the proper channels.
- Added one-click disable all mods function, convenient for quick debugging
- Added forced clean-up feature (see in-plugin instructions for details)
- Optimized multi-mod file conflict detection and resolution
- Added intelligent mod file path recognition, no longer need to fully follow the old mod file structure
- Added FTP feature, supporting mod file transfer to a relay station via FTP
- Rewritten MTP feature for more stable transfer (however, folder-based mods may still cause MTP freezing; in such cases, it is recommended to package as ZIP or use FTP)
- In short, the entire project has been rewritten, all features rebuilt, and a bunch of detailed logic optimizations, most of which I’ve already forgotten.

v2.27
中文

- 使用最新的libnx重新编译，支持AMS1.10与HOS21
- 修复zip文件名有其他"."的时候识别不到的问题

 EN

- Recompiled with the latest libnx, supporting AMS 1.10 and HOS 21.  
- Fixed the issue where zip files with additional "." in the filename could not be recognized.

v2.26
中文

优化冲突检测逻辑，现在允许多个MOD之间存在公用文件。
取消按B打断卸载MOD的功能。
修复文件类型MOD安装的一个恶性BUG
EN
Optimized conflict detection logic, now allowing multiple mods to share common files.
Removed the feature to cancel mod uninstallation by pressing B.
Fixed a critical bug in file-type mod installation.
